hypothesis: If perturbed and generated crystal structures are evaluated with DFT-grounded relaxation RMSD and convex-hull SUN metrics, then scores will degrade monotonically with increasing distortion and yield model rankings that correlate more strongly with thermodynamic stability (energy above hull ≤0.1 eV/atom) than latent/property-only metrics, because these measures directly reflect geometry optimization outcomes and phase-diagram energetics.
